projects.title: astrofish
projects.tagline: GGJ 2025 game jam submission: a fish trying to reach space.

mechanics.subtitle: moving platform
mechanics.description: a moving platform that oscillates horizontally, providing a dynamic element to the level design.

mechanics.subtitle: fish shooter
mechanics.description: shooting mechanic for the fish character, allowing them to fire water shots at enemies.

mechanics.subtitle: Systemic Loot & Probability Engine
mechanics.description: A designer-centric loot system that uses weighted probability to handle item drops upon entity destruction.

mechanics.subtitle: Game State Manager
mechanics.description: A centralized manager utilizing the Singleton design pattern to govern high-level game states and persistent UI logic across scene transitions.

mechanics.subtitle: Player Health & Attribute Controller
mechanics.description: A performance-optimized health system featuring passive regeneration logic, conditional 'God Mode' overrides, and efficient UI synchronization.
